subject: Your AI agent is ready — here's your first 5-min setup
body:
Welcome aboard! Your AI agent is ready to start saving you time. In just 5 minutes, you can set up your first automation — no technical skills needed.

Here's what happens next:
• Complete our quick-start wizard (guided, step-by-step)
• Enable your first automation — we recommend starting with email triage
• See results immediately

Small business owners using our platform save an average of 8 hours/week in their first month. Let's get you there.

P.S. Need help? Reply to this email or use the in-app chat — we're here.

subject: 3 real small businesses saving 12+ hrs/week with AI agents
body:
Wondering what's possible? Here are three small business owners who automated routine work and reclaimed their weeks.

1. A boutique retail shop — automated inventory alerts and customer follow-ups → saved 14 hrs/week
2. A solo consultant — automated scheduling, invoicing, and client intake → saved 12 hrs/week
3. An e-commerce store — automated order confirmations, refunds, and stock updates → saved 18 hrs/week

Each of these workflows took under 10 minutes to set up. Ready to try another one?

subject: Your agent learns your business — here's how to train it
body:
The more your AI agent knows about your business, the more time it saves. Training it is simple.

Step 1: Connect your tools — email, calendar, CRM, invoicing (2 minutes)
Step 2: Set your preferences — how you like things organized (1 minute)
Step 3: Let it learn — the agent adapts to your patterns over time

Watch our 2-minute walkthrough showing exactly how to connect your tools. After that, it's set-it-and-forget-it.

Need help? Our live chat team is available during business hours.

subject: What would you do with 40 extra hours this month?
body:
Here's the math: Our average user saves 10 hours per week. That's 40 hours per month — an entire work week back in your hands.

What would that look like for your business?
• More time with clients
• Focus on growth, not admin
• Actual weekends off

"I didn't realize how much time I was wasting on repetitive tasks until my agent took over. Now I focus on what matters." — Sarah, retail business owner

Most popular automations this quarter: customer follow-ups, invoice reminders, meeting scheduling. Try adding one more to your setup.

subject: You've saved [X] hours already — here's what's next
body:
Great progress! Based on your activity, you've already saved meaningful time. Now let's take it further.

Premium features to explore:
• Advanced multi-step workflows
• Multi-agent teams (agents that work together)
• Custom integrations with your specific tools
• Priority support

For a limited time, upgrade to Annual and save 20%. See how [Similar Business] scaled from solopreneur to 5-person team using premium AI agents.

No matter what you choose, we're glad you're here.

subject: Your summer assistant that never takes a vacation ☀️
body:
Summer is here — but your business doesn't slow down. Let your AI agent handle the busy season while you enjoy the sunshine.

Three 10-minute automations for July:
1. Auto-respond to vacation inquiries
2. Schedule social media posts for the month
3. Triage urgent vs. non-urgent emails

Client spotlight: A tourism business automated 90% of booking confirmations this summer, saving 15 hours per week.

Quick tip: All automations work on mobile — manage from anywhere.

What's your biggest time-waster this summer? Hit reply and let us know.

subject: We crunched the numbers — users save 14 hrs/week ⏱️
body:
Our Q2 data is in, and the results are clear: businesses using AI agents are saving serious time.

By the numbers:
• Average time saved: 14 hours per week per user
• Top automation: customer email management (42% of all automations)
• 91% of users reported lower stress levels around admin tasks

Before: 3 hours/day on scheduling, follow-ups, and invoices
After: 30 minutes/day — the agent handles the rest

New this quarter: Our reporting dashboard shows exactly where your time is being saved. See it in action.

subject: Q4 is coming — is your business automated enough?
body:
The busiest quarter of the year is almost here. Now is the perfect time to make sure your systems are ready.

Q4 readiness checklist:
✓ Automated invoice reminders (get paid faster during the holiday rush)
✓ Scheduling that handles increased demand
✓ Customer communication templates for seasonal messaging

New features to help you prepare:
• Bulk workflow templates for Q4 scenarios
• Advanced scheduling rules
• Multi-language support for EU customers

Early-bird offer: Lock in current annual pricing before Q4 rate adjustments. Act by September 30.

subject: Haven't seen you — what's been keeping you busy?
body:
Hey there — we noticed it's been a while. Hope things are going well on your end!

Since your last visit, we've made some improvements:
• Templates library — pre-built workflows, ready in one click
• Mobile app overhaul — full functionality on the go
• Faster setup wizard — new users are up and running in under 3 minutes

No pressure — just wanted to let you know what's new. Log in whenever you're ready.

Anything we can help with? Just reply.

subject: Remember why you signed up — here's a fresh idea
body:
You originally signed up to save time on [industry-specific task]. We've got a new workflow that does exactly that — better than before.

One use case you may not have tried: automated client follow-ups.
• New leads get a response within 2 minutes
• Follow-ups happen automatically at the right interval
• You never lose track of a prospect again

This workflow takes 2 clicks to install. A similar business owner told us it saved them 6 hours in the first week alone.

Worth a look?

subject: Come back — 1 month free + priority support
body:
We'd love to have you back. Here's what we're offering:

🎁 1 month free on your next billing cycle
⭐ Priority support access for 30 days (responses within 1 hour)

How to reactivate:
1. Log in to your account
2. Pick up where you left off — your data is still there
3. Use the in-app chat for priority support

This offer expires in 14 days. No strings attached — if it's not for you, you can pause anytime.

subject: Should we pause your account?
body:
If your business needs have changed, we understand. Here are your options:

A. Pause account — we keep everything safe, no charges until you return
B. Download your data — your automations, templates, and settings are yours
C. Reactivate now — one click, everything is as you left it

We'd also appreciate 30 seconds of your time: What was the main reason you stopped using our platform?
• Too complicated
• Didn't see results
• Budget reasons
• Business needs changed
• Other

Whatever you choose, thank you for giving us a try. If you ever want to come back, we'll be here.
